channel.title: HoopsHype Rumors - Memphis Grizzlies
channel.description: Memphis Grizzlies trade rumors and free agency buzz from HoopsHype

item.title: Grizzlies were going to pursue Ja Morant trade no matter the lottery outcome
item.description: Tim MacMahon: “I can just say the lottery results will have no impact on the approach moving forward with Ja Morant. They’re going to try to find a home for Ja Morant regardless of where they ended up in the lottery.”

item.title: It didn't take long for an agent on the ground in …
item.description: It didn't take long for an agent on the ground in Chicago to suggest to me that Memphis could potentially look to trade down from No. 3 as part of deal that ships out Morant, but I find such a scenario almost certainly too drastic. If anything Grizzlies president Zach Kleiman has a history of trading up and/or into the draft. Don't forget that he just did so last June, swapping picks with Portland to be able to select Cedric Coward at No. 11 overall.

item.title: Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up …
item.description: Jake Fischer: Emerging from the sequestered lottery room to report Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up second as well. So, the league had to toss out that outcome and draw again… which led to the Grizzlies claiming the third pick.

item.title: Wizards win 2026 draft lottery
item.description: Shams Charania: Top 4 order in the 2026 NBA Draft: 1. Washington Wizards 2. Utah Jazz 3. Memphis Grizzlies 4. Chicago Bulls

item.title: Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls make the top four in the draft lottery
item.description: Josh Robbins: The Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls are the teams that will draft somewhere in the top four.

item.title: Grizzlies were going to pursue Ja Morant trade no matter the lottery outcome
item.description: Tim MacMahon: “I can just say the lottery results will have no impact on the approach moving forward with Ja Morant. They’re going to try to find a home for Ja Morant regardless of where they ended up in the lottery.”

item.title: It didn't take long for an agent on the ground in …
item.description: It didn't take long for an agent on the ground in Chicago to suggest to me that Memphis could potentially look to trade down from No. 3 as part of deal that ships out Morant, but I find such a scenario almost certainly too drastic. If anything Grizzlies president Zach Kleiman has a history of trading up and/or into the draft. Don't forget that he just did so last June, swapping picks with Portland to be able to select Cedric Coward at No. 11 overall.

item.title: Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up …
item.description: Jake Fischer: Emerging from the sequestered lottery room to report Utah actually won the No. 3 pick after popping up second as well. So, the league had to toss out that outcome and draw again… which led to the Grizzlies claiming the third pick.

item.title: Wizards win 2026 draft lottery
item.description: Shams Charania: Top 4 order in the 2026 NBA Draft: 1. Washington Wizards 2. Utah Jazz 3. Memphis Grizzlies 4. Chicago Bulls

item.title: Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls make the top four in the draft lottery
item.description: Josh Robbins: The Wizards, Jazz, Grizzlies and Bulls are the teams that will draft somewhere in the top four.
